name: industrial-data-quality
description: Assess industrial data readiness for agent decision support, with focus on missing, dirty, drifted, delayed, and inconsistent signals.

agents.name: data-engineer
agents.role: Assess time alignment, missingness, schema drift, stale readings, and pipeline health.

agents.name: ai-data-remediation-engineer
agents.role: Propose safe remediation options and label correction boundaries.

agents.name: analytics-reporter
agents.role: Summarize quality metrics, trend impacts, and operational reporting needs.

agents.name: reality-checker
agents.role: Flag unsupported assumptions, unverifiable data claims, and unsafe confidence inflation.

agents.name: evidence-collector
agents.role: Collect evidence, unresolved questions, and audit-ready data quality notes.
